address: The George Inn, Leek Road, Waterhouses, Staffordshire ST10 3HW
lead_profile_text: Moving to US, property managed remotely. 6-bed large group property (The George Inn). No mortgage discussed — likely owned outright.
emotional_profile: Pragmatic and analytical. Time-pressured by imminent return to US. Main anxiety is remote management visibility and cost transparency. Engaged and expansive — mentioned sister's Cornwall properties.
green_light_trigger_phrases: I need to decide before I go back
needs decision by end of next week

top_objections.text: Managing the property remotely from the US
top_objections.zac_response: Slack channel with dedicated team, monthly statements 1st-5th, quarterly inspection calls

top_objections.text: I want to understand the costs more
top_objections.zac_response: Full cost breakdown provided — all-inclusive cleaning charged to guest, £300 maintenance threshold, owner pays mortgage/insurance/utilities

top_objections.text: I'd like more control over pricing
top_objections.zac_response: Dynamic pricing reviewed weekly with manual oversight — owner can flag concerns
Slack channel, monthly statements, quarterly review calls
Platforms consolidated to build review concentration on Airbnb and Booking.com; VRBO audience overlaps

top_questions.text: What platforms will you list on?
top_questions.answer: Airbnb, Booking.com, and Stayful direct booking site

top_questions.text: What about adding a hot tub?
top_questions.answer: Mutually agreed to defer — assess performance first before adding maintenance risk

top_questions.text: What is the timeline from contract to live?
top_questions.answer: 3 weeks from signed agreement including photographer, cleaner inspection, and snagging list

what_moved_them: 6 years and 80 properties — scale gave credibility
Quarterly inspections reassured on remote property oversight
Monthly payout 1st-5th — specific timeline built confidence
3 weeks contract to live — shorter than expected
what_fell_flat: VRBO exclusion — Helen sees value in VRBO's off-season performance and pricing tools

conversion_gaps.gap: Pricing control anxiety not fully resolved
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Offer pricing review call at 3-month mark; show dynamic pricing log example

conversion_gaps.gap: No direct comparable 6-bed group property in Stayful portfolio
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Find Peak District or large-format group property case study before June 1 follow-up

offer_framing: 13% + VAT if signed by 14 June — framed around Helen's US departure deadline creating a natural close window
zac_close_phrase: Helen needs to decide before she returns to the US — let's get you an action plan and speak Monday to finalise
zac_income_intro: Comparable properties earning £120-150k annually — conservative forecast £90k based on low occupancy expectation for large group format
zac_transition_phrases: Let me show you what comparable properties are doing
The key thing for your situation is the remote management piece
zac_reassurance_phrases: Monthly statements go out 1st to 5th — never missed
Quarterly inspection calls so you always know the state of the property
£500 security deposit because of the property value — we take protection seriously
